'''lanosho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:smake|smake]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-n-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:smake|smake]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| lanosho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lænesheth|lænesheth]] || [[word:læneshej|læneshej]] || [[word:læneshesh|læneshesh]] || [[word:læneshe|læneshe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lanonoshoth|lanonoshoth]] || [[word:lanonoshoj|lanonoshoj]] || [[word:lanonoshosh|lanonoshosh]] || [[word:lanonosho|lanonosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lanoshoth|lanoshoth]] || [[word:lanoshoj|lanoshoj]] || [[word:lanoshosh|lanoshosh]] || [[word:lanosho|lanosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lanofshoth|lanofshoth]] || [[word:lanofshoj|lanofshoj]] || [[word:lanofshosh|lanofshosh]] || [[word:lanofshof|lanofshof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lanoshotho|lanoshotho]] || [[word:lanoshojo|lanoshojo]] || [[word:lanoshosho|lanoshosho]] || [[word:lanoshoko|lanoshoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lanoshoth|lanoshoth]] || [[word:lanoshoj|lanoshoj]] || [[word:lanoshosh|lanoshosh]] || [[word:lanosho|lanosho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lanoshothol|lanoshothol]] || [[word:lanoshojol|lanoshojol]] || [[word:lanoshoshol|lanoshoshol]] || [[word:lanoshokol|lanoshokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lanoshothotho|lanoshothotho]] || [[word:lanoshojojo|lanoshojojo]] || [[word:lanoshoshosho|lanoshoshosho]] || [[word:lanoshoko|lanoshoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lanoshothon|lanoshothon]] || [[word:lanoshojon|lanoshojon]] || [[word:lanoshoshon|lanoshoshon]] || [[word:lanoshokon|lanoshokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lanoshothoro|lanoshothoro]] || [[word:lanoshojoro|lanoshojoro]] || [[word:lanoshoshoro|lanoshoshoro]] || [[word:lanoshokoro|lanoshokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
